# freeipa_hbac_service_group (Resource)

Manages FreeIPA HBAC Service Groups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the HBAC service group.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the HBAC service group.
- `services` (Set of String) Set of HBAC service names associated with this group.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique name of the HBAC service group.
